title: Research: pecan_lsp in-process services prototype
body:
## What was done

Implemented **pecan_lsp** services: hover, definition, references, completions, and symbol extraction utilities—**in-process** with the compiler, not a stdio language server.

## Why it mattered

Validated IDE feature shapes and data requirements before investing in workspace-wide `beskid_lsp` and extension packaging.

## Research conclusion

Prototype proved UX value; production path uses **stdio LSP** + bundled `beskid_lsp` (v0.1+). **pecan_lsp** remains historical.

source.subject: Add LSP services module with hover, definition, references, completions, and symbol extraction utilities
